import { Component } from '@angular/core'; import { Item } from 'src/app/models/item'; import { DataService } from 'src/app/services/data.service'; @Component({ selector: 'app-add-items', templateUrl: './add-items.component.html', styleUrls: ['./add-items.component.css'] }) export class AddItemsComponent { item: Item = new Item(); constructor( private svc:DataService ) { } onSubmitForm() { this.svc.postItem(this.item).subscribe(x => console.log("item added") ) } }

Add new items

Item name is requred!!
Unit Price is required
